headline: Crypto Exchange Bullish Soars on ‘Transformative’ $4 Billion Bet on Transfer Agents
summary: Bullish shares are rising after the cryptocurrency-exchange announced a $4 billion acquisition that would make it a global transfer agent for tokenized securities.

headline: Buffett's Legendary Premium Wiped Out — Berkshire Trails S&P 500 By 41 Points Since Retirement News
summary: Berkshire Hathaway stock is underperforming the S&P 500, but it's not just because of Warren Buffett stepping down.

headline: Regnology Completes Acquisition of Moody’s Regulatory Reporting & Asset and Liability Management (ALM) Solutions
summary: FRANKFURT, Germany, May 05, 2026--Regnology completes Moody's ALM & Reg Reporting acquisition, expanding its global footprint & deepening its functional coverage for financial firms.
